div.head: The Secretary of State to the Ambassador in the United Kingdom (Kennedy)
div.p: 381. Personal for the Ambassador. Please express orally to Lord Halifax my appreciation for the advance information regarding the Palestine White Paper which was furnished by the British Embassy here. Unless you perceive some objection I should also like to have you mention, orally and informally, that you believe he would wish to know that there is rather widespread disappointment, particularly in Zionist circles here, at some of the provisions of the White Paper, particularly those which envisage eventually a marked reduction in Jewish immigration into Palestine.
